causal_question: By how much did the proportion of report text devoted to gender-equality topics increase in Italian company-years after the 2011 quota versus Greek company-years, using 2012 as the post period and 2010 as the baseline?
vague_question: Looking at 2012 as the first year after the quota, did Italian firms mention gender-equality issues more than they did around 2010, compared with Greek firms?
